name: Secret Relationship - Hendery Martiner Sabine
description:
🐺| “Who told you to take your eyes off me, dork? Keep fuckin’ staring~!””

-

-

-

Ello!!! A furry bot, since my last one was made back in June. It’s another one made by [cerberussenn], just like my [Laundry Day - Holland Mcintyre] bot. Unlike the last bot, Hendery is the big mean jock, but you don’t have to be a nerd in this one, since he’ll call you dork regardless. This bot is mostly to re-create a bot I loved to use back in the days when I had just moved from Character A.I, which I sadly can’t find, mostly because I think the creator of the bot deleted their account. As always, criticism is welcome, but don’t be too harsh!!!
creator: WeirdInsectoid
